LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays Sitetracker Map Layers on a Project record page with runtime layer selection, panel visibility controls, multi-field filters, satellite/terrain basemap switching, and Work Log creation.

property.name: mapHeightPx
property.label: Map Height (px)
property.description: Height of the map area in pixels.

property.name: workLogFieldSetApiName
property.label: Production Work Log Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Production_Work_Log__c used to control fields shown in the Create Work Log modal.

property.name: siteDetailFieldSetApiName
property.label: Site Detail Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Site__c used to show Site details in the Create Work Log modal.

property.name: segmentDetailFieldSetApiName
property.label: Segment Detail Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Segment__c used to show Segment details in the Create Work Log modal.

property.name: layerFilterFieldSetApiName
property.label: Layer Filter Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set API name used to define multi-select filters for each selected layer.

property.name: mapLayerRecordId1
property.label: Deprecated - Map Layer Record Id 1
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride1
property.label: Deprecated - Project Relationship Field Override 1
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride1
property.label: Deprecated - Filter Field Override 1
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: mapLayerRecordId2
property.label: Deprecated - Map Layer Record Id 2
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride2
property.label: Deprecated - Project Relationship Field Override 2
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride2
property.label: Deprecated - Filter Field Override 2
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: mapLayerRecordId3
property.label: Deprecated - Map Layer Record Id 3
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride3
property.label: Deprecated - Project Relationship Field Override 3
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride3
property.label: Deprecated - Filter Field Override 3
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: mapLayerRecordId4
property.label: Deprecated - Map Layer Record Id 4
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride4
property.label: Deprecated - Project Relationship Field Override 4
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride4
property.label: Deprecated - Filter Field Override 4
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: mapLayerRecordId5
property.label: Deprecated - Map Layer Record Id 5
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride5
property.label: Deprecated - Project Relationship Field Override 5
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride5
property.label: Deprecated - Filter Field Override 5
property.description: Deprecated legacy property retained so existing Lightning page assignments keep working. Leave blank for new configurations.
